---
about:  
  template: trestles
  image: img/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - text: "{{< fa brands github size=huge >}}"
      href: https://github.com/hrlai
    - text: "{{< ai google-scholar size=huge >}}"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=g9SWxxcAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate
    - text: "{{< fa brands researchgate size=huge >}}"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Hao_Ran_Lai
    - text: "{{< fa brands linkedin size=huge >}}"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/haoranlai/
    - text: "{{< fa brands orcid size=huge >}}"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6871-0146
    - text: "{{< fa envelope size=huge >}}"
      href: mailto:hrlai.ecology@gmail.com
  
toc: false
---

## Quantitative and Functional Ecology

Apa khabar! My name is Lai Hao Ran (賴浩然). As a plant community ecologist, my research aims to understand and generalise the dynamics of forest biodiversity through functional traits and statistical rigour through long-term monitoring. 
<!-- I am now broadening my research into multitrophic interactions and ecological networks, leveraging advanced quantitative and trait-based methods developed in my field and applying them to the study of ecological networks. -->
My long-term career goal is to build capacity and foster an innovative research community in Malaysia and tropical Asia.

Please feel free to reach out for research collaboration, forest fieldwork, guest lecturing and student (co)supervision.

### Current position
Ecologist / Data scientist, South East Asia Rainforest Research Partnership (SEARRP), Malaysia <span title="2025 ForestGEO Research Awards">{{< fa award >}}</span>

### Past position
2019--2025 | Post-doctoral fellow, School of Biological Sciences, University of Canterbury, New Zealand <span title="Marsden Fast Start Grant">{{< fa award >}}</span>

2019 | Visiting Research Fellow, Centre for Urban Greenery and Ecology, National Parks Board, Singapore <span title="CUGE Visiting Research Fellowship">{{< fa award >}}</span>

2015--2018 | Teaching assistant, National University of Singapore, Singapore <span title="2018 Teaching Assistant Award">{{< fa medal >}}</span> <span title="2017 Teaching Assistant Award">{{< fa medal >}}</span>

### Education
2015--2018 | PhD, Department of Biological Sciences, National University of Singapore, Singapore <span title="International Society for Plant Molecular Biology Medal for most outstanding thesis">{{< fa medal >}}</span>

2009--2012 | BSc (Hons), School of Biological Sciences, The University of Queensland, Australia <span title="University Medal">{{< fa medal >}}</span> <span title="D.A. Herbert Prize in Botany">{{< fa medal >}}</span> <span title="F.A. Perkins Prize in Entomology">{{< fa medal >}}</span>
